Lesson 12 Summary Guide
 Two types of email messages:
o Broadcasts
o Follow-up (autoresponders)
 Broadcasts include a special email sent out at a specific time
for a specific purpose
o Designed for one-off messages, product launches,
affiliate launches, special events, campaigns, etc…
 Create your autoresponder timeline sequence
o Series of follow-up messages to be scheduled out at
specific time intervals
 Important to make sure your first 5 to 6 AR messages include
your absolute best material…first impressions are key!
 Need to create a bond with your list before you send them any
type of promotional broadcast
 Establish a “Blended Sequence”
o Build a bond with the first 5 to 6 messages, then follow
with a special broadcast message (see below)
